evals.prompt: Audit the responsive design implementation and identify layout issues at mobile viewports
evals.expected_output: Findings with specific breakpoints, fixed pixel values, and CLS sources with remediation plan

assertions.text: Output scans for fixed pixel widths using grep or codebase search
Output scans for hardcoded font sizes in px
Output checks for images without width/height attributes
Output tags findings with [HECHO] with file references
Output mentions viewport meta tag verification
Output mentions mobile-first vs desktop-first breakpoint approach
Output provides specific code fixes, not just descriptions
Output includes a testing strategy (Playwright or DevTools)

evals.prompt: Design a fluid typography system using clamp() for a 9-step type scale
evals.expected_output: Complete type scale with clamp() values, line heights, and measure settings

assertions.text: Output uses clamp() syntax for all font sizes
Output provides at least 6 type steps
Output uses rem units (not px) for min/max clamp values
Output includes viewport-based preferred value (vw units)
Output provides line-height as unitless ratio
Output mentions ch units for max-width on prose
Output explains the fluid range (min viewport to max viewport)

evals.prompt: Implement container queries to make the ProductCard component context-aware
evals.expected_output: Container query implementation with container-type, named containers, and component variants

assertions.text: Output sets container-type on wrapper element
Output uses @container rule with condition
Output uses named container with container-name
Output mentions browser support (Chrome 105+, Firefox 110+, Safari 16+)
Output explains difference from viewport media queries
Output does NOT put container-type on the component itself
Output provides before/after code comparison

evals.prompt: Fix CLS of 0.28 caused by images and dynamic content on the homepage
evals.expected_output: Root cause analysis with specific elements causing CLS and code fixes for each

assertions.text: Output mentions images without width/height as primary CLS source
Output provides aspect-ratio CSS or explicit dimensions solution
Output mentions font-display property for web font CLS
Output mentions reserving space for dynamic content (min-height)
Output mentions using transform instead of layout-affecting animations
Output provides WCAG/CWV threshold reference (0.1 for Good)
Output provides verification method (Lighthouse rerun)

evals.prompt: Design responsive image strategy for a Next.js e-commerce site with 500+ product images
evals.expected_output: srcset/sizes strategy, LCP image optimization, Next.js Image component usage, and image build pipeline

assertions.text: Output recommends Next.js Image component
Output explains srcset with w descriptors
Output explains sizes attribute with media conditions
Output identifies LCP image and marks it with priority/fetchpriority
Output warns against loading=lazy on LCP image
Output mentions WebP or AVIF format
Output mentions explicit width/height for CLS prevention
Output addresses image optimization build pipeline (sharp or similar)
